transcript: This is Cliff, may I help you?
Well, if you're trying to be funny, I don't appreciate it.
I'm not understanding what you're talking about. What you're... you're, you're talking about a mule, we don't work with mules.
I think I've pretty much laid it on the line.
Well, now, if you tell me what the hell you want and quit being such a wiseass, I'll work with you, but until you... as long as you're being a dog... smartass, I don't have to put up with it, either!
What... come on down and talk to me about it, then! If you want to use fists, bring it on down!
Come on down and use your boots too, if you think you're man enough!
Come on down and talk to me about it, then!
I'm prepared to do whatever it takes, as long as you wanna be all manly about it!
Would you like to come down and talk to me man-to-man like that? You're awful brave talkin' to me over the phone.
Uh, I wasn't a Green Beret for 12 years for nothing, mister, so you come down and talk to me.
Oh, well, you just sound like a real skinny little shithead, talk to a man over the phone and not to his face.
You... you... you're pretty dumb. A man that hasn't got any more to do than what you're doing is pretty useless.
You ought to just go ahead and take the shotgun and blow your brains out, 'cause you's not no good to nobody.
I'm gonna keep you on the phone for a little bit. We've been having this trouble with you, and we got someone on the police tracing the calls so we can locate you.
